title: October Inflation Down By 16.05% - FinancialEDGE

html:
In October 2025, the Headline inflation rate eased to 16.05% relative to the September 2025 headline inflation rate of 18.02%.

On a month-on-month basis, the Headline inflation rate in October 2025 was 0.93%, which was 0.21% higher than the rate recorded in September 2025 (0.72%).

The Food inflation rate in October 2025 was 13.12% on a year-on-year basis. This was 26.04% points lower compared to the rate recorded in October 2024 (39.16%).

On a month-on-month basis, the Food inflation rate in October 2025 was -0.37%, up by 1.21% compared to September 2025 (-1.57%).
